name: Traditional Christmas Fudge
recipeIngredient: Nestle Toll House Semi-sweet Chocolate Morsels, 1 1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, evaporated milk, sugar, and salt in a medium, heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Boil for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in marshmallows, chocolate morsels, nuts, and vanilla. Stir vigorously for 1 minute or until marshmallows are melted.
5. Pour into an 8-inch square baking pan lined with foil.
6. Sprinkle with additional pecans if desired.
7. Chill until firm.
Variations:
- Milk Chocolate Fudge: Substitute 2 cups (11 1/2 oz.) of Nestle Toll House Milk Chocolate Morsels for Semi-Sweet Morsels.
- Butterscotch Fudge: Substitute 2 cups (12 oz.) of Nestle Toll House Butterscotch Flavored Morsels for Semi-Sweet Morsels.
- Mint-Chocolate Fudge: Substitute 1 1/2 (10 oz.) packages of Nestle Toll House Mint-Chocolate Morsels for Semi-Sweet Morsels.
